name: Steak & Ale Marinade
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Red wine (or purple grape juice)
1/4 cup White wine (or white grape juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients for steaks and marinate in the fridge up to 24 hours.
2. Mix the ingredients for chicken or pork separately and marinate in the fridge up to 24 hours.
3. Add a dash of Worcestershire sauce to the steak marinade.
